input.prompt:
I need to support three branded themes in my .NET MAUI app — a light theme,
a dark theme, and a high-contrast theme. Users should be able to pick their
preferred theme from a settings page and it should apply immediately across
the app. How do I set this up?

data.reasoningText: The user is asking how to set up themed resource dictionaries in a .NET MAUI app with three branded themes (light, dark, high-contrast) that can be switched at runtime from a settings page. This is a general "how do I" question — not a code change request against an existing repo. I'll provide a concise but complete answer.
